author: lOrm
content: Duplicate of #899 (same defect: parse_nested_elements in src/tool_intercept.rs has no element-count, value-length, or recursion bound). Canonical: #899. Note: #343 is a broader, still-open parser overhaul tracking the same root cause; #899 remains open and may end up resolved by #343, but it is the LOWER of the two QA dispatch reports so it inherits the canonical role.
